sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26878" key="dikaiopoie/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῐκαιο-ποιέω</orth>, <sense id="n26878.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">act honestly,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4013.tlg006:p.129D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Epict.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.129D.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
